profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ and technology decision-making in Houston — fully within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

signals.signal_title: Azure Synapse Analytics and Databricks in production for data and analytics workloads
signals.signal_description: Phillips 66 has deployed Azure Synapse Analytics and Databricks in production as the foundation for data modernization and analytics workloads across refining, midstream, and marketing operations. Part of the SAP-based digital transformation launched in 2022.

signals.signal_title: AI and data science programs under CIO Pandrangi — featured at 2024 Gartner Global CIO Summit
signals.signal_description: CIO Naveen Pandrangi presented AI, data science, connected workforce, and operational streamlining initiatives at the 2024 Gartner Global CIO Executive Summit. Phillips 66 is building AI capabilities on top of its SAP and Azure Synapse data foundation.

signals.signal_title: SAP-based digital transformation launched 2022 — data analytics and AI foundation for hydrocarbon operations
signals.signal_description: Phillips 66 launched a SAP-based digital transformation program in 2022 providing the data analytics and AI foundation for refining, midstream, and chemicals operations. Program underpins Azure Synapse and Databricks analytics workloads.

signals.signal_title: IBM Maximo for Enterprise Asset Management and GEP SMART for Procurement under evaluation
signals.signal_description: Phillips 66 is evaluating IBM Maximo for Enterprise Asset Management and GEP SMART for Procurement as of 2025. These platform decisions represent active IT investment cycles in operations and supply chain technology.
